title: AssociationEngineSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the record association builder settings for an org. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableAssociationEngine.description: Automatically associates new accounts with the user’s current branch by creating branch unit customer records. The default value is false.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an AssociationEngineSettings component.
